title: OpenAI Preps for IPO in 2026, Says ChatGPT Must Be 'Productivity Tool'
description: OpenAI CEO of Applications Fidji Simo said the company is orienting aggressively toward high-productivity use cases as it prepares for IPO.

title: OpenAI to Sell AI to US Agencies Through Amazon Cloud Unit
description: OpenAI signed a new deal to sell access to its AI models to U.S. defense and government agencies through Amazon's cloud unit for classified and unclassified work.

title: Jeff Bezos Reportedly Wants $100 Billion to Buy and Transform Manufacturing Firms with AI
description: The Amazon magnate has a new project centered around acquiring industrial firms and revamping them with AI technology (Project Prometheus).

title: Nvidia's 'Super Bowl of AI' GTC, Tesla Disappoints, Meta VR 'Shutdown'
description: Nvidia GTC roundup: CEO Jensen Huang on the future of the company, Tesla disappoints fans, and Meta's VR metaverse shutdown.

title: The Download: Quantum Computing for Health, Nvidia DLSS 5 Backlash, AI Agent Rogue at Meta
description: Daily roundup: Google pitching AI to Pentagon as defense partner, rogue AI agent at Meta leaked info, Nvidia DLSS 5 'slop filter' gamer backlash, Sony removes 135K deepfakes.

title: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain Distillation
description: NVIDIA introduces Nemotron-Cascade 2, an open 30B MoE model (3B active) achieving Gold Medal-level performance in IMO, IOI, and ICPC. Second open-weight LLM after DeepSeekV3.2-Speciale to achieve this triple.

title: F2LLM-v2: Inclusive, Performant, and Efficient Embeddings for a Multilingual World
description: New family of general-purpose multilingual embedding models in 8 sizes (80M to 14B). F2LLM-v2-14B ranks first on 11 MTEB benchmarks, supporting 200+ languages.

title: FinTradeBench: A Financial Reasoning Benchmark for LLMs
description: Benchmark for evaluating LLM financial reasoning integrating company fundamentals and trading signals. 1,400 questions over NASDAQ-100 companies. 14 LLMs evaluated.

title: NavTrust: Benchmarking Trustworthiness for Embodied Navigation
description: First unified benchmark that systematically corrupts input modalities (RGB, depth, instructions) for evaluating embodied navigation robustness.

title: 马斯克亲自点赞，Kimi 动了十一年没人敢碰的东西
description: Elon Musk publicly endorsed a Chinese AI company (Kimi/Moonshot AI) technical paper — surprising given the geopolitical context.

title: AI 输入法，还会有什么新故事？
description: 输入法正在融入大模型技术——能听懂方言、自动整理口语为书面语、帮写文案续写。从打字工具变为理解用户意图的表达助手。

title: AI 眼镜卷来卷去，终于有一副让我不想摘了
description: 在世界人工智能大会的千镜大战中，阿里巴巴的夸克AI眼镜选择了一条更朴实的路：先让人愿意天天戴。附详细测评。

title: Using.AI 获数千万元 Pre-A 轮融资，抢占 AGI+工业赛道
description: 深圳贝尔信息科技完成数千万元 Pre-A 轮融资（君联资本、金沙江联合资本），通过 AGI 技术赋能泛工业领域控制决策。

title: Xiaomi Introduces MiMo-V2-Pro LLM for the Agent Era
description: Xiaomi officially enters the AI race with MiMo-V2-Pro, a flagship LLM designed for the emerging agent era with over 10B parameters.

title: Agents Over Bubbles — Stratechery by Ben Thompson
description: Ben Thompson argues we're not in an AI bubble on the morning of Nvidia's GTC. Analysis of AI agents as the real value driver.
